title: Your Reputation
description: A WTHIT/Jade plugin that displays your reputation on a tooltip with each villager.
body: [![Mod Loader: Fabric](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=modloader&message=fabric&color=brightgreen)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) ![Mod Environment](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=environment&message=client%2Fserver&color=yellow) [![MIT License](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=licence&message=MIT&color=blue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Aton-Kish/your-reputation/1.18/LICENSE) [![Ko-fi](https://www.ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/atonkish) # Your Reputation **The project for Minecraft versions 1.21 and later has been moved:** - for WTHIT: https://modrinth.com/mod/your-reputation-wthit - for Jade: https://modrinth.com/mod/your-reputation-jade Your Reputation is a [WTHIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/wthit)/[Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) plugin that displays your reputation on a tooltip with each villager. [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) Requires [WTHIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/wthit)/[Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade). | Reputation | Value | Tooltip | | ----------- | ------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Friendly | 100 or more | | | Trustworthy | more than 0 and less than 100 | | | Neutral | equal to 0 | | | Suspicious | more than -100 and less than 0 | | | Hostile | -100 or less | | If your reputation is "Hostile", villagers may be snitches. And then, iron golems will get angry and attack you...
